name: LV_001_01_SRVTOT
definition:
CREATE VIEW [DBO].[LV_001_01_SRVTOT]
AS
WITH CTE
     AS (SELECT STOCKREF,
                INVENNO,
                DATE_,
                PURAMNT,
                PURCASH,
                PURCURR,
                SALAMNT,
                SALCASH,
                SALCURR,
                SRV.CARDTYPE
           FROM    LV_001_01_STINVTOT_V1 V1 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
                INNER JOIN
                   LG_001_SRVCARD SRV
                ON (V1.STOCKREF = SRV.LOGICALREF)
          WHERE VARIANTREF = 0 AND TYP = 1
         UNION ALL
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                INVENNO,
                DATE_,
                PURAMNT,
                PURCASH,
                PURCURR,
                SALAMNT,
                SALCASH,
                SALCURR,
                SRV.CARDTYPE
           FROM    LV_001_01_STINVTOT_V2 V2 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
                INNER JOIN
                   LG_001_SRVCARD SRV
                ON (V2.STOCKREF = SRV.LOGICALREF)
          WHERE VARIANTREF = 0 AND TYP = 1
         UNION ALL
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                INVENNO,
                DATE_,
                0 PURAMNT,
                0 PURCASH,
                0 PURCURR,
                0 SALAMNT,
                0 SALCASH,
                0 SALCURR,
                SRV.CARDTYPE
           FROM    LV_001_01_STINVTOT_V3 V3 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
                INNER JOIN
                   LG_001_SRVCARD SRV
                ON (V3.STOCKREF = SRV.LOGICALREF)
          WHERE VARIANTREF = 0 AND TYP = 1
         UNION ALL
         SELECT STOCKREF,
                INVENNO,
                DATE_,
                0 PURAMNT,
                0 PURCASH,
                0 PURCURR,
                0 SALAMNT,
                0 SALCASH,
                0 SALCURR,
                SRV.CARDTYPE
           FROM    LV_001_01_STINVTOT_V5 V5 WITH(NOEXPAND,NOLOCK)
                INNER JOIN
                   LG_001_SRVCARD SRV
                ON (V5.STOCKREF = SRV.LOGICALREF)
          WHERE VARIANTREF = 0 AND TYP = 1)
  SELECT 1 AS LOGICALREF,
         STOCKREF AS CARDREF,
         INVENNO,
         MONTH(DATE_) AS MONTH_,
         CASE CARDTYPE
            WHEN 1
            THEN
               SUM(PURAMNT)
            WHEN 2
            THEN
               SUM(SALAMNT)
            ELSE
               0
         END
            AS TOTALS_AMOUNT,
         CASE CARDTYPE
            WHEN 1
            THEN
               SUM(PURCASH)
            WHEN 2
            THEN
               SUM(SALCASH)
            ELSE
               0
         END
            AS TOTALS_CASHAMNT,
         CASE CARDTYPE
            WHEN 1
            THEN
               SUM(PURCURR)
            WHEN 2
            THEN
               SUM(SALCURR)
            ELSE
               0
         END
            AS TOTALS_CURRAMNT,
         0 AS TOTALS_VATAMNT,
         0 AS TOTALS_DISCAMNT,
         0 AS TOTALS_RETAMNT,
         YEAR(DATE_) AS YEAR_
    FROM CTE
GROUP BY STOCKREF,
         INVENNO,
         CARDTYPE,
         MONTH(DATE_),
         YEAR(DATE_)
UNION ALL
  SELECT 1 AS LOGICALREF,
         STOCKREF AS CARDREF,
         -1 AS INVENNO,
         MONTH(DATE_) AS MONTH_,
         CASE CARDTYPE
            WHEN 1
            THEN
               SUM(PURAMNT* (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
            WHEN 2
            THEN
               SUM(SALAMNT* (-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
            ELSE
               0
         END
            AS TOTALS_AMOUNT,
         CASE CARDTYPE
            WHEN 1
            THEN
               SUM(PURCASH*(-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
            WHEN 2
            THEN
               SUM(SALCASH*(-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
            ELSE
               0
         END
            AS TOTALS_CASHAMNT,
         CASE CARDTYPE
            WHEN 1
            THEN
               SUM(PURCURR*(-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
            WHEN 2
            THEN
               SUM(SALCURR*(-COALESCE(WH.VIRTUALINVEN, 0) + 1))
            ELSE
               0
         END
            AS TOTALS_CURRAMNT,
         0 AS TOTALS_VATAMNT,
         0 AS TOTALS_DISCAMNT,
         0 AS TOTALS_RETAMNT,
         YEAR(DATE_) AS YEAR_
    FROM CTE CTEALS INNER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_CAPIWHOUSE WH ON CTEALS.INVENNO = WH.NR
   WHERE WH.FIRMNR = 001
GROUP BY STOCKREF,
         CARDTYPE,
         MONTH(DATE_),
         YEAR(DATE_)
